t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key from Trade.Instrument. Identifies the tradeable instrument pair.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Primary key from Trade.Instrument. Identifies the tradeable instrument pair.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Forex, 2=Commodity, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Forex, 2=Commodity, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Computed: TDCUR_BUY.Abbreviation + '/' + TDCUR_SEL.Abbreviation. Display name for UI (e.g., EUR/USD, AAPL/USD).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Computed: TDCUR_BUY.Abbreviation + '/' + TDCUR_SEL.Abbreviation. Display name for UI (e.g., EUR/USD, AAPL/USD).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: (alias of InstrumentID — no independent upstream description)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Alias of InstrumentID (InstrumentID AS DWHInstrumentID). Always equals InstrumentID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Buy-side asset. For forex: base currency; for stocks: asset itself (BuyCurrencyID=InstrumentID). Inherited from Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Buy-side asset. For forex: base currency; for stocks: asset itself (BuyCurrencyID=InstrumentID). Inherited from Trade.Instrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Sell-side (denomination) currency. For forex: quote currency; for stocks: trading currency. Inherited from Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Sell-side (denomination) currency. For forex: quote currency; for stocks: trading currency. Inherited from Trade.Instrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Trading symbol / ticker. "USD", "AAPL.US", "BTC", "GOLD". UNIQUE constraint. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Trading symbol / ticker for the buy-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "AAPL.US". UNIQUE constraint in production. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added 'for the buy-side currency', changed example values, added 'in production'

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Trading symbol / ticker. "USD", "AAPL.US", "BTC", "GOLD". UNIQUE constraint. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Trading symbol / ticker for the sell-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "GBX". UNIQUE constraint in production. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added 'for the sell-side currency', changed example values, added 'in production'

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Allowed trade range (pip distance) for pending orders. From Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Allowed trade range (pip distance) for pending orders. From Trade.Instrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Price scaling factor. Most=1; JPY pairs=100. From Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Price scaling factor. Most=1; JPY pairs=100. From Trade.Instrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Max pip difference for price validation. From Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Max pip difference for price validation. From Trade.Instrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=major instrument (spread/margin treatment); 0=minor. From Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1=major instrument (spread/margin treatment); 0=minor. From Trade.Instrument. Stored as int (original production type is bit).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Industry sector label from IMD (e.g., Technology, Consumer Goods). NULL for forex/crypto.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Industry sector label from IMD (e.g., Technology, Consumer Goods). NULL for forex/crypto. From Trade.InstrumentMetaData.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Extended company/instrument description. Nullable.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Extended company/instrument description. Nullable.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Exchange name string (e.g., "NASDAQ"). Populated from Price.Exchange via ExchangeID. May be denormalized.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Exchange name string (e.g., "NASDAQ"). Populated from Price.Exchange via ExchangeID. May be denormalized.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: International Securities Identification Number. Required for stocks (e.g., US0378331005 for Apple). NULL for forex/crypto. Used for compliance and dividend matching.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: International Securities Identification Number. Required for stocks (e.g., "US0378331005" for Apple). NULL for forex, commodities, indices, most crypto. Used for compliance and dividend matching.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Expanded NULL coverage from 'forex/crypto' to 'forex, commodities, indices, most crypto'

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Country prefix of ISIN (e.g., "US"). Audit-tracked.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country prefix of ISIN (e.g., "US"). Audit-tracked.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1 = orders allowed, 0 = trading disabled. Set by EnableInstrument/DisableInstrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1 = orders allowed, 0 = trading disabled. Set by EnableInstrument/DisableInstrument. DWH note: CAST from bit to int, value preserved.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short ticker symbol (e.g., "AAPL", "EURUSD"). Used for display and lookup. Not necessarily unique.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short ticker symbol (e.g., "AAPL", "EURUSD"). Used for display and lookup. Not necessarily unique.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Percentage of position that can use bonus credit. Trade.InstrumentNWADecreasePercentage view.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Percentage of position that can use bonus credit. From Trade.ProviderToInstrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full/canonical symbol, UNIQUE. Used for instrument lookup. Primary identifier in Security Ops API.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Full/canonical symbol, UNIQUE in production. Used for instrument lookup. Primary identifier in Security Ops API.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Alias for InstrumentMetaData.Cusip. Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures code for US/Canada securities. NULL for forex, crypto, many non-US instruments.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Alias for InstrumentMetaData.Cusip. Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures code for US/Canada securities. NULL for forex, crypto, many non-US instruments.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Decimal places for price display and rounding. Used by Trade.ChangeTreePropertiesPerInstrument, Trade.UpdatePositionsTakeProfitByInstrumentID.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Decimal places for price display and rounding. From Trade.ProviderToInstrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=buy allowed, 0=buy disabled for this instrument-provider pair.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1=buy allowed, 0=buy disabled for this instrument-provider pair. DWH note: CAST from bit to int.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=sell allowed, 0=sell disabled.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1=sell allowed, 0=sell disabled. DWH note: CAST from bit to int.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1=hidden from external clients (internal/ops only), 0=visible to all.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1=hidden from external clients (internal/ops only), 0=visible to all. DWH note: CAST from bit to int.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Contract size per point. Used for notional and fee calculation.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Contract size per point for futures instruments. Used for notional and fee calculation. NULL for non-futures (15,464 rows).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added 'for futures instruments' and NULL rate

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Trade.Provider. Identifies the execution provider (e.g., 1=Tradonomi). Part of PK.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Trade.Provider. Identifies the execution provider (e.g., 1=Tradonomi). From Trade.ProviderToInstrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Cash margin required to open one unit/lot of this futures instrument with this provider. Expressed in the instrument's base currency.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Cash margin required to open one unit/lot of this futures instrument with this provider. Expressed in the instrument's base currency. Renamed from InitialMargin.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Initial margin in asset currency. Sample 90, 3, or NULL.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Initial margin in asset currency as set by eToro. Renamed from InitialMarginInAssetCurrency. From Trade.ProviderToInstrument.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Time of day for settlement.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Time of day for settlement. DWH note: reformatted from Trade.FuturesMetaData.SettlementTime via FORMAT(DATEPART(HOUR)*100 + DATEPART(MINUTE), '00:00').

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Trading operation mode: 0=Standard, 1=Alternate (e.g., European stocks in non-USD). From Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Trading operation mode: 0=Standard (13,140 instruments), 1=Alternate (2,566, primarily European stock CFDs traded in non-USD denomination currencies like EUR, GBX). From Trade.Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Changed counts to DWH-level, expanded description

issues.problem: Footer claims '30 T1, 13 T2, 2 T3' = 45, but actual element count is 33 T1, 12 T2, 2 T3 = 47. Both T1 and T2 counts are wrong and the sum is off by 2.

issues.column_or_section: Multiple T1 columns (AllowBuy, AllowSell, Tradable, VisibleInternallyOnly, IsMajorID, etc.)
issues.problem: 15 of 33 Tier 1 columns carry additive DWH notes appended to the upstream text, breaking the verbatim contract. No semantic loss, but the pattern is pervasive.
Uses vague group names ('Fact tables (positions, orders, trades)', 'BI_DB aggregation tables') instead of specific object names. An analyst cannot determine actual dependencies.
Tagged Tier 1 but SP applies FORMAT(DATEPART(HOUR)*100 + DATEPART(MINUTE), '00:00') — an arithmetic transform that could justify Tier 2.
Row count (15,707) present but no date range. Arguable for a truncate-and-reload dimension, but standard template expects it.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Fix footer tier counts to 33 T1, 12 T2, 2 T3 = 47 total. (2) For T1 columns, keep upstream text verbatim and place DWH notes in a separate parenthetical after the upstream quote. (3) Replace vague entries in Section 6.2 with specific object names. (4) Consider re-tagging SettlementTime as Tier 2 given FORMAT/DATEPART transform.
